title: Bristol Bay is Safe!!!
summary: Nick Hall We are so grateful to receive the news this morning that the EPA has blocked Pebble Mine forever under the Clean Water Act so that Bristol Bay can remain a biologically and culturally thriving place for generations to come. Since 2009 alone, Alaska Conservation Foundation has given over 4....

title: United States cattle inventory down 3%
summary: There were 89.3 million head of cattle and calves on U.S. farms as of Jan. 1, 2023, according to the Cattle report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).

title: League Supports Arctic Film Screenings in Portland
summary: In January, Alaska Wilderness League teamed up with partners in Portland to host two exciting and well-attended film events. title: The Hidden Gem in Generational Theory: A Key to Arctic Challenges
summary: The focus of this article is on the climate policy implication and internalization of policy implementation across generations. The post The Hidden Gem in Generational Theory: A Key to Arctic Challenges appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
